records.title: Block Out Noise for Deeper Sleep — Dreamegg D11 Sound Machine
records.description: Light sleepers, this one's for you. The Dreamegg D11 plays 21 soothing sounds all night to mask disruptions — USB rechargeable and compact enough for travel.

records.title: Stop Being Woken by Every Little Sound — Dreamegg D11
records.description: With 21 white noise and nature sounds, the Dreamegg D11 masks the noises that keep light sleepers awake. Rechargeable, portable, and built for better nights.

records.title: Mask Noise, Sleep Through the Night — Dreamegg D11
records.description: 21 calming sounds, a built-in night light, and USB recharge — the Dreamegg D11 is made for anyone who wakes at every creak. Small enough for the bedside or suitcase.

records.title: Calm Your Mind for Sleep — Dreamegg D11 Sound Machine
records.description: Soothing sounds help anxious minds switch off at bedtime. The Dreamegg D11 offers 21 sleep sounds, a night light, and USB recharge — a simple wind-down companion.

records.title: A Quiet Routine for Restless Minds — Dreamegg D11
records.description: Racing thoughts at bedtime? 21 calming sounds from the Dreamegg D11 help ease anxiety and signal to your brain it's time to sleep. Compact and rechargeable.

records.title: Sleep Sounds That Ease an Anxious Mind — Dreamegg D11
records.description: The Dreamegg D11's 21 sounds — rain, white noise, fan — create a consistent sleep environment that helps anxious sleepers let go of the day. Rechargeable, portable.

records.title: Build a Better Bedtime Routine — Dreamegg D11 Sound Machine
records.description: If you struggle to settle, the Dreamegg D11 helps signal sleep time with consistent sound. 21 options, night light included — rechargeable for anywhere you rest.

records.title: Settle Down Faster — Dreamegg D11 White Noise Machine
records.description: Tossing and turning? Consistent background sound helps restless sleepers transition to sleep faster. The Dreamegg D11 packs 21 sounds into a compact, rechargeable device.

records.title: Stop Tossing and Turning — Dreamegg D11 Sound Machine
records.description: The Dreamegg D11 creates a calming environment that restless sleepers can wind down into. 21 sounds, built-in night light, USB charged — and small enough for travel.
